scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/client & npm run dev --workspace=packages/server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/server && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/server
scripts.build:client: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
